title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
